zh.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne是Eudes II de Bourgogne和Marie de Blois-Champagne的女兒，於1145年7月29日出生在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆布謝特。她於1165年5月16日與Robert VI d'AUVERGNE在法國奧維-o-阿爾培斯結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1202年7月22日在法國帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年56歲，埋葬在法國安喬豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易豐特福洛 艾比 其特利。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne是Eudes II de Bourgogne和Marie de Blois-Champagne的女儿，于1145年7月29日出生在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯德o姆布謝特。她于1165年5月16日与Robert VI d'AUVERGNE在法国奧維-o-阿爾培斯结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1202年7月22日在法国帕斯 德 拉 洛易麥-吉洛易豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易享年56岁，埋葬在法国安喬豐特福勞爾吉利阿巴易豐特福洛 艾比 其特利。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Bourgogne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Bourgoin
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Alphee, Alyre, Andre, Armand, Aurore, Celina, Emile, Gilberte, Jacques, Laurent, Lucienne, Olivier.

variant of Bourgouin (and, in North America, an altered form of this), a habitational name for someone from Burgundy (Old French Bourgogne), a region of eastern France having Dijon as its center. The area was invaded by the Burgundii, an ancient Germanic tribe from whom it takes its name, in about AD 480. The duchy of Burgundy, created in 877 by Charles II, King of the Western Franks, was extremely powerful in the later Middle Ages, especially under Philip the Bold (1342–1404; duke from 1363). Compare Bourgoyne and Bourguignon .

nameMeanings.name: Mathilde
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Matilda
meanings: Latinized form of a Germanic personal name derived from maht, meht ‘might’ + hild ‘battle’. This was the name of an early German queen ( 895–968 ), wife of Henry the Fowler, who was noted for her piety and generosity. It was also the name of the wife of William the Conqueror and of the daughter of Henry I of England ( see Maud ). The name was introduced into England by the Normans, and this Latinized form is the one that normally occurs in medieval records, while the vernacular form Maud was the one in everyday use. Matilda was revived in England as a learned form in the 18th century.

en.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne was born on 29 July 1145, in Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France as the daughter of Eudes II de Bourgogne and Marie de Blois-Champagne. She married Robert VI d'AUVERGNE on 16 May 1165, in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 22 July 1202, in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, at the age of 56, and was buried in Fontevraud Abbey Cemetery, Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, France.

fr.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne est née le 29 juillet 1145, à Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France, fille d’Eudes II de Bourgogne et Marie de Blois-Champagne. Elle a épousé Robert VI d'AUVERGNE le 16 mai 1165, à Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 22 juillet 1202, à Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, France, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterrée à Fontevraud Abbey Cemetery, Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, France.

de.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne wurde am 29. Juli 1145 in Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich, als Tochter von Eudes II de Bourgogne und Marie de Blois-Champagne geboren. Sie hat am 16. Mai 1165 in Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Frankreich Robert VI d'AUVERGNE geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 22. Juli 1202 im Alter von 56 Jahren in Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Frankreich und wurde in Fontevraud Abbey Cemetery, Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, Frankreich begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne è nata il il 29 luglio 1145 nel Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia come figlia di Eudes II de Bourgogne e Marie de Blois-Champagne. Lei sposato Robert VI d'AUVERGNE il 16 maggio 1165, nel Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 22 luglio 1202, nel Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolta a Fontevraud Abbey Cemetery, Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, Francia.

ja.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogneは1145年7月29日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスドルoメボウチェトでEudes II de BourgogneとMarie de Blois-Champagneの娘として生まれた。1165年5月16日にフランスアウバーグネ-ルhoネ-アルペスでRobert VI d'AUVERGNEと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1202年7月22日にフランスペイズ ド ラ ロイアーメインエ-エト-ロイアーフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイで56歳で死去し，フランスアンジョウフォンテvラウルト-ル'アッバイフォンテvラウド アビー セメテリーにて埋葬された。

ko.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이
ko.Fontevraud Abbey Cemetery, Fontevrault-l: 프랑스 앤조우 폰테브라트-'압베이 폰테브라드 애브브이 세멧리
ko.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne(은)는 1145년 7월 29일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스 드o 부쳇에서 Eudes II de Bourgogne(와)과 Marie de Blois-Champagne의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1165년 5월 16일 프랑스 오버그니-ho니-알프스에서 Robert VI d'AUVERGNE(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1202년 7월 22일 프랑스 파이스 데 라 로이르 맹-트-로이르 폰테브라트-'압베이에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 프랑스 앤조우 폰테브라트-'압베이 폰테브라드 애브브이 세멧리에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne nasceu em 29 de julho de 1145, em Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França filha de Eudes II de Bourgogne e Marie de Blois-Champagne. Ela casou-se com Robert VI d'AUVERGNE em 16 de maio de 1165, em Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 22 de julho de 1202, em Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, França, com 56 anos, e foi sepultada em Fontevraud Abbey Cemetery, Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, França.

ru.Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pa: фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция
ru.Fontevraud Abbey Cemetery, Fontevrault-l: фонтеврауд эбби кеметири, фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, анджоу, Франция
ru.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne родилась 29 июля 1145 г. в местности боучет, дрoм, аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. Её родителей звали Eudes II de Bourgogne и Marie de Blois-Champagne. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert VI d'AUVERGNE 16 мая 1165 г. в местности аувиргне-рoне-алпесь, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 22 июля 1202 г. в местности фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, меине-ет-лоир, пеис де ла лоир, Франция в возрасте 56 лет и была похоронена в местности фонтеврауд эбби кеметири, фонтевраулт-л'аббеи, анджоу, Франция.

es.lifeSummary: Mathilde de Bourgogne nació el 29 de julio de 1145, en Bouchet, Drôme, Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia como hija de Eudes II de Bourgogne y Marie de Blois-Champagne. Se casó con Robert VI d'AUVERGNE el 16 de mayo de 1165, en Auvergne-Rhône-Alpes, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 22 de julio de 1202, en Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Maine-et-Loire, Pays de la Loire, Francia, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultada en Fontevraud Abbey Cemetery, Fontevrault-l'Abbaye, Anjou, Francia.
